G0.label:
case cons.nil
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
f : α → β
h : Injective f
head✝ : α
tail✝ : List α
tail_ih✝ : map f tail✝ ⊆ map f [] ↔ tail✝ ⊆ []
⊢ map f (head✝ :: tail✝) ⊆ map f [] ↔ head✝ :: tail✝ ⊆ []

G1.label:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
f : α → β
h : Injective f
head : α
tail : List α
tail_ih : map f tail ⊆ map f [] ↔ tail ⊆ []
⊢ map f (head :: tail) ⊆ map f [] ↔ head :: tail ⊆ []
